Pour une petite ou moyenne entreprise (PME), établir une présence forte sur le marché peut être un défi de taille. Que vous soyez une entreprise en pleine croissance ou un acteur bien établi, le marketing joue un rôle essentiel dans la visibilité de votre marque, l'acquisition de nouveaux clients, et la fidélisation de votre base existante. Cependant, le marketing pour les PME nécessite des stratégies ciblées et des outils efficaces pour maximiser l'impact. Dans cet article, nous allons examiner l'importance d'une stratégie marketing efficace et comment PRO GESTION SOFT peut aider les PME à atteindre leurs objectifs. Créer une identité de marque forte : Le marketing aide à établir l'identité de votre entreprise et à la différencier de la concurrence. Cela passe par des messages cohérents, un logo distinctif, et une présence active sur les réseaux sociaux. Attirer de nouveaux clients : Une stratégie marketing bien conçue vous permet de toucher de nouveaux clients grâce à des campagnes ciblées, du contenu engageant, et des techniques de référencement (SEO) pour améliorer votre visibilité en ligne. Fidéliser votre clientèle : Il est essentiel de garder vos clients existants engagés grâce à des promotions, des newsletters, et une communication régulière. Le marketing relationnel aide à renforcer les liens avec vos clients.

PRO GESTION SOFT ne se limite pas à la gestion des ressources humaines et des finances. Il propose également des fonctionnalités qui peuvent booster vos efforts marketing : Gestion centralisée des courriels : Créez, envoyez, et suivez vos campagnes par e-mail de manière simple. Vous pouvez facilement segmenter vos clients en différentes listes pour des campagnes ciblées. Analyse des données en temps réel : Suivez l'efficacité de vos campagnes marketing en visualisant les statistiques clés, telles que le taux d'ouverture, le taux de conversion, et plus encore. Collaboration fluide entre équipes : Travaillez main dans la main avec votre équipe marketing pour planifier et exécuter des campagnes sans accroc.
documents.s: Comment PRO GESTION SOFT peut améliorer votre marketing

documents.t: -Misez sur le contenu : Rédigez des articles de blog, des guides, et créez des vidéos qui intéressent votre public. Restez actif sur les réseaux sociaux : Identifiez où se trouve votre audience (Facebook, LinkedIn, Instagram) et engagez-la avec du contenu pertinent. Optimisez votre site pour le SEO : Assurez-vous que votre site est facilement trouvable via les moteurs de recherche. En utilisant PRO GESTION SOFT, votre entreprise peut gérer ses campagnes marketing plus efficacement tout en centralisant tous les processus de gestion. Contactez-nous pour découvrir comment nous pouvons transformer votre marketing ! Cet article a été généré avec l'aide de l'intelligence artificielle pour apporter une perspective innovante et enrichir notre contenu. Nous nous engageons à fournir des informations pertinentes et de qualité pour aider les PME à réussir dans un environnement numérique en constante évolution.
documents.s: Les meilleures pratiques marketing pour les PME

documents.t: Les petites et moyennes entreprises (PME) sont le cœur économique de nombreux pays, y compris en Afrique. Elles représentent une grande partie de l'innovation, de l'emploi et de la croissance. Cependant, ces entreprises rencontrent souvent des défis importants en matière de gestion quotidienne, notamment la gestion des ressources humaines, des finances, des documents et des processus de recrutement. C'est là qu'une solution de gestion intégrée devient cruciale. Dans cet article, nous allons explorer les avantages d'un système de gestion intégré pour les PME et comment PRO GESTION SOFT peut transformer la gestion de votre entreprise. Une gestion intégrée fait référence à l'utilisation d'une plateforme unique pour centraliser et automatiser tous les processus de gestion d'une entreprise. Au lieu d'utiliser plusieurs outils déconnectés, une solution intégrée permet aux entreprises de gérer efficacement tous les aspects de leur activité à partir d'un seul endroit. Cela comprend la gestion des courriels, des ressources humaines, des documents, des recrutements et des facturations.

Amélioration de l'efficacité opérationnelle : La gestion des différentes fonctions de l'entreprise à partir d'une seule plateforme permet de réduire les tâches redondantes, d'optimiser les processus internes et de gagner du temps. Les employés peuvent se concentrer sur leurs tâches essentielles sans se soucier de la gestion de multiples outils. Accès centralisé aux informations : Une solution intégrée comme PRO GESTION SOFT centralise toutes les données de l'entreprise, des informations sur les employés aux documents importants. Cela simplifie l'accès aux informations et réduit le risque de perdre des documents essentiels. Réduction des erreurs humaines : L'automatisation des tâches et l'intégration des processus réduisent les risques d'erreurs humaines. Par exemple, la gestion de la paie, des absences ou des factures est automatisée, ce qui garantit une précision accrue. Meilleure prise de décision : Grâce à un accès rapide et précis aux données de l'entreprise, les dirigeants peuvent prendre des décisions plus éclairées. Ils peuvent avoir une vue d'ensemble de la performance de l'entreprise et identifier rapidement les domaines nécessitant des améliorations. Sécurisation des données : La centralisation des informations au sein d'une plateforme permet de mieux protéger les données de l'entreprise. Les solutions intégrées offrent généralement des fonctionnalités de sécurité avancées, telles que des sauvegardes automatiques et des protocoles de cryptage.
documents.s: Les avantages d'une gestion intégrée pour les PME

documents.t: PRO GESTION SOFT est une plateforme de gestion intégrée spécialement conçue pour les PME béninoises et africaines. Elle vous permet de gérer : Les courriels de l'entreprise : Gestion centralisée des e-mails entrants et sortants, traitement et instructions entre les équipes. Les ressources humaines : Gestion de la paie, des contrats, de la formation, de la présence et des absences. Les documents de l'entreprise : Bibliothèque cloud sécurisée pour centraliser et sauvegarder tous les documents importants. Le recrutement : Publication des offres d'emploi, tests en ligne et gestion du recrutement à distance. Les facturations : Suivi des ventes et des achats de manière simple et efficace. Pour les PME, l'intégration des différents processus de gestion dans une plateforme unique n'est plus un luxe, mais une nécessité. Cela permet non seulement de gagner du temps et d'améliorer l'efficacité, mais aussi de se concentrer sur ce qui compte vraiment : faire croître l'entreprise. Avec PRO GESTION SOFT, vous disposez d'une solution clé en main pour transformer la gestion de votre entreprise et relever les défis modernes. Prêt à découvrir comment PRO GESTION SOFT peut aider votre entreprise à atteindre de nouveaux sommets ? Contactez-nous dès aujourd'hui pour en savoir plus. Cet article a été généré avec l'aide de l'intelligence artificielle pour apporter une perspective innovante et enrichir notre contenu. Nous nous engageons à fournir des informations pertinentes et de qualité pour aider les PME à réussir dans un environnement numérique en constante évolution.
documents.s: Comment PRO GESTION SOFT peut aider votre PME ?

documents.t: Pour les PME, la gestion financière est cruciale non seulement pour maintenir une bonne santé économique, mais aussi pour planifier et investir dans la croissance future. Une mauvaise gestion des finances peut rapidement devenir un obstacle majeur, entraînant des problèmes de trésorerie ou des opportunités manquées. Heureusement, des solutions modernes comme PRO GESTION SOFT sont là pour simplifier et optimiser la gestion financière. Dans cet article, nous vous expliquons pourquoi la gestion financière est un pilier fondamental de la réussite des PME et comment PRO GESTION SOFT peut vous aider. Manque de visibilité sur la trésorerie : Beaucoup de PME peinent à suivre leurs flux de trésorerie en temps réel. Cela peut entraîner des décisions basées sur des informations obsolètes ou incomplètes. Comptabilité complexe : Les PME doivent souvent jongler avec des obligations fiscales, des feuilles de paie, et des rapports financiers qui peuvent devenir rapidement accablants sans outils adéquats. Gestion des coûts et des profits : Savoir où et comment investir est une tâche difficile sans un aperçu clair des revenus et des dépenses de l’entreprise.

Avec PRO GESTION SOFT, gérer vos finances devient plus simple grâce à des fonctionnalités avancées conçues pour les PME : Automatisation de la paie : Simplifiez la gestion de la paie en calculant automatiquement les salaires, les déductions, et en générant des fiches de paie conformes. Suivi des ventes et des achats : Gérez facilement les factures de vente et d'achat, et surveillez les flux de trésorerie pour éviter tout problème de liquidité. Rapports financiers en un clic : Créez des rapports détaillés sur la santé financière de votre entreprise, comprenant des analyses des coûts, des profits, et des prévisions budgétaires.
documents.s: Comment PRO GESTION SOFT optimise la gestion financière

documents.t: Suivre les flux de trésorerie quotidiennement : La trésorerie est le sang qui circule dans votre entreprise. Un suivi régulier aide à anticiper les problèmes et à prendre des mesures correctives à temps. Planifier les dépenses et les investissements : Mettez en place un budget mensuel et ajustez-le en fonction des performances de votre entreprise. Analyser régulièrement les performances financières : Comparez vos résultats avec les objectifs que vous vous êtes fixés et ajustez votre stratégie en conséquence. Grâce à PRO GESTION SOFT, votre PME peut gérer efficacement ses finances et se concentrer sur la croissance. N'attendez plus pour simplifier vos opérations financières ! Cet article a été généré avec l'aide de l'intelligence artificielle pour apporter une perspective innovante et enrichir notre contenu. Nous nous engageons à fournir des informations pertinentes et de qualité pour aider les PME à réussir dans un environnement numérique en constante évolution.
documents.s: Les bonnes pratiques pour une gestion financière saine

documents.t: Logging into your account on PRO GESTION SOFT is designed to be fast, secure, and simple. If you are already registered, you can easily log in at https://progestionsoft.com/login, using your email address and password. Here’s a detailed guide to help you through this step, as well as options in case you forget your password.

To access your account, follow these steps: Enter your email address: Make sure to enter the email address you used during registration. Double-check it, as even a small error may prevent you from logging in. Enter your password: The password must be the same one you set during registration. For security reasons, your password is hidden by symbols while typing to protect your information from prying eyes. Click the "Login" button: Once your credentials are entered, click the login button to submit your information. We will check if the information matches an existing account. If correct, you will be redirected to your account’s home page.

We understand that it’s possible to forget your password. To facilitate account recovery, we have implemented a simple and secure password reset procedure. Here’s how to proceed: Click on "Forgot password" on the login page, just below the "Login" button to start the reset process. Enter your email address: A new page will open, prompting you to enter the email address associated with your account. This step is crucial as it allows us to verify your identity by sending a six (6)-digit code to a verified email address. Receive the verification code: Once your email address is submitted, we will send you an email containing a six (6)-digit code to reset your password. This code is valid for 15 minutes. Create a new password: After entering the code received by email, you will be directed to a page where you can choose a new password. Ensure that you create a strong password, following the security recommendations (at least eight characters, with uppercase and lowercase letters, digits, and symbols). Log in with the new password: Once your password is reset, you can return to the login page and use your new email address and password combination to access your account. Tips to ensure your account’s security To maintain a high level of security for your account, here are some best practices to follow: Change your password regularly: Regularly updating your password helps limit the risks of your account being compromised. Do not share your login details: Keep your password private and avoid sharing it with others, even those you trust. Use a password manager: If you find it hard to remember a complex password, consider using a secure password manager to store and protect your information. Monitor suspicious logins: If you notice any unusual activity on your account, such as logins you didn’t make, immediately contact our support team to take the necessary actions.
Read this section faster with available resources.

Registering on PRO GESTION SOFT is a simple yet essential process to ensure the security and authenticity of each user. It takes place at https://progestionsoft.com/register and is carried out in two distinct steps, aimed at gathering precise information and validating your identity. Here’s a detailed overview of each step:

In this first phase, you will be asked to provide basic information to create your account. This information includes: Tax Identification Number (IFU): This number identifies the entity and is required for legal and administrative purposes. Company Name: This is the official name of the company or organization. Legal Status: This information specifies the legal type of the entity (e.g., LLC, Corporation, SAS, etc.). Email Address: Please enter a valid and accessible email address, as it will be the primary communication channel. After entering this information, a six-digit verification code will be sent to the provided email address. This code is necessary to confirm that you are the owner (or an authorized administrator) of the address. This step also ensures that the email address is active and functional.

Once the email is successfully verified, you can proceed to finalize your registration by providing additional information. During this step, you will be asked to enter the following: Phone Number: This number can be used for future communications if needed or for further verification. Registration Number (RCCM): A valid registration number is required to legally identify the entity. Password: Choose a secure password. It must be at least eight (8) characters long and include: A digit A symbol An uppercase letter A lowercase letter Ensure that your password meets these criteria to guarantee the security of your account and avoid any risk of compromise. note Required Fields: All the fields mentioned above are mandatory. You will not be able to complete your registration without filling in each field. It is also essential to read and accept our Terms of Service and Data Processing Policy before submitting your registration. Data Collection: The information collected is intended to ensure transparent use of our services and to protect your account from fraud attempts.
Read this section faster with available resources.

Quick access to "GENERAL" To quickly access the GENERAL section, simply type a keyword into the search bar to find the section without manually navigating through menus. Here is a list – not exhaustive – of supported search keywords. We understand the importance of having accurate and up-to-date profiles, whether for the main user or the company. We allow you to easily update your personal and business information at any time, ensuring that your profile accurately reflects your identity and company details.

Regularly updating your profile ensures the accuracy of information, which can be crucial for certain operations or for verifying your identity. It also helps your collaborators, partners, or contacts to have up-to-date data. In cases of incorrect entries during registration, new contact information, or an update to the company's trade name, it is essential to reflect these changes in your profile.

Log in to your account. Click on the profile icon in the top-right corner of your interface to access the profile menu. Select "Expand" to access the "GENERAL" section of your Profile Space, where all the main account-related information is centralized. In this section, you can update your personal or business information.

Here you can update important information such as your first and last name, your date and place of birth, or your profile picture. To make these changes, click on the Edit Your Info button. Once the information is updated, save the changes to make them effective.

Details about your company, such as the trade name, logo, and business contact information, can also be adjusted to reflect your company's evolution. note Trade name: You can update your company's trade name to reflect any administrative changes. This update, however, is limited to once every 30 days to maintain profile consistency. Company logo: To enhance your company's visual identity, you can add or update the logo. This logo is visible to you and can be made public during recruitment processes. To make these changes, click on Switch to edit mode in the company information section. This will enable the text fields and options needed to update your company's details. Once the changes are made, make sure to save them. To update your email address, scroll down the section to find the Edit email address button. Follow the instructions to enter your new address. Once this operation is validated, a confirmation email will be sent to verify your new address.

warning You can change your profile picture and company logo at any time, and as often as you like. However, it is important to note that once an image is set, it cannot be deleted, only replaced with a new one. Therefore, make sure to select representative and high-quality images. Your personal profile and company profile are represented by distinct images: Profile picture: This visually represents your personal account and is located in the personal information section, at the top when you access General in your profile space. Company logo: This allows for quick identification of your company. It is located at the very bottom of the business information section in General in your profile space. To update your profile picture or company logo, click on the corresponding icon in the GENERAL section and select the desired image from your files. Tips for Choosing the Right Images Profile picture: Choose a clear, sharp, and professional photo to represent your profile. Company logo: Select an official, well-framed logo that respects your brand's colors and proportions. Ensure the file is of good resolution for optimal visibility on the platform. We encourage you to use [1:1] aspect ratio formats. Profile Navigation Tips To quickly access a specific section of your profile, you can use the search bar at the top of the page. For example, if you want to directly find the section to change your email address, simply type "email" into the search bar to be directed there.
documents.s: Managing profile pictures and company logos

Quick access to "DOCUMENTS" To quickly access the DOCUMENTS section, simply type a keyword into the search bar to find the section without manually navigating through menus. Here is a list – not exhaustive – of supported search keywords. Congratulations! You have successfully created an account on PRO GESTION SOFT and can now access it. To ensure the authenticity of the provided information and the security of your account, KYC (Know Your Customer) verification is required. This process validates your identity and your company’s legal information.

The purpose of KYC verification is to protect users by ensuring that each account belongs to a verified and authentic entity. This step not only complies with legal requirements but also secures the platform by restricting access to authenticated users only. Thus, KYC verification is essential to gain full and secure access to the advanced features of Pro Gestion Soft.
We will assist you in verifying your account through a few simple steps and monitoring the verification status.

warning You can submit a KYC verification request only once every 30 days. Make sure all documents provided are up-to-date and legitimate, and that the information is accurate. To complete your account verification, please follow these detailed steps: Log in to your account. In the top-right corner of your interface, click on the profile icon (or your profile picture if you’ve already changed it at least once) to open the dropdown menu. Select " Expand " to access your Profile Space. Navigate to the DOCUMENTS section where you can initiate the verification process. You will see fields for the required information and documents, including: Tax ID Document: Upload a copy of your Tax Identification Number (IFU), which identifies your company for tax purposes. Business Registration Certificate: A copy of your business registration certificate, proving the legal existence of your company. Manager's ID: This document validates the identity of the account’s responsible person. Once the information and documents are provided, click Save to submit your details. Tips for document validation Ensure document quality: Submitted documents must be perfectly legible. Avoid blurry, cropped, or poorly framed photos, as these may delay validation. Prefer clear scans or sharp photographs, ensuring that all important details are visible. Check file size and format: Files must be in PDF, JPEG, or PNG format, with a maximum size of 5 MB per document. Ensure the file format is correct to avoid upload failures. Keep information up to date: In case of a change in management or updated company documents, it’s important to submit recent versions. Keeping your account compliant avoids any restrictions.

KYC verification may take between 24 and 72 hours. Once approved, you will receive a confirmation email. After submitting your documents, we will review your information and send you an email notification confirming that the verification is in progress. You can track the status of your verification by returning to the DOCUMENTS section in your profile. note Data confidentiality: All documents submitted for KYC verification are strictly confidential. Pro Gestion Soft adheres to a strict privacy policy, and no document will be shared with third parties without your consent. Account security: This step is crucial to ensure the security and validity of your account. Without KYC verification, access to certain platform features may be restricted or suspended.
Read this section faster with available resources.

Quick access to "SECURITY" To quickly access the SECURITY section, simply type a search keyword into the search bar to find the section without manually navigating through the menus. Here is a list – not exhaustive – of supported search keywords.

Quick access to "SECURITY" To quickly access the GENERAL section, simply type a keyword into the search bar to find the section without manually navigating through menus. Here is a list – not exhaustive – of supported search keywords. Account security is a priority for PRO GESTION SOFT. To better protect your personal and sensitive information, we offer the option to enable multi-factor authentication (2FA). This system adds an extra layer of security by requiring validation at each login to confirm that you are the legitimate user of your account.

Multi-factor authentication, often abbreviated as 2FA or MFA, is a security method that requires two steps of verification to confirm your identity. In addition to the usual password, it adds a verification step via email to ensure that only you can access your account. Multi-factor authentication is crucial for: Preventing unauthorized access by adding an extra layer of verification. Strengthening the security of sensitive data and protecting your account from hacking attempts. Providing users with peace of mind by adding a security barrier.

Follow the steps below to enable two-factor authentication on your account: Log in to your account. In the navigation interface, click on your profile icon to open the menu. Click on Expand to access your profile space. In your profile space, go to the Security section via the right-hand tabs. Under the Two-Factor Authentication section, click on the Enable button. Once this step is completed, two-factor authentication via email will be enabled on your account.

From now on, each time you log in, you will need to go through a two-step validation process: Login with your credentials: Enter your email address and usual password to log in. Email verification: A verification email containing a validation code will be sent to the email address associated with your account. This code is for one-time use and expires in 15 minutes. Enter the code: Input the received code in the login interface to finalize access to your account. CODE VALIDITY DURATION The validation code sent via email is temporary. Be sure to use it quickly, as it will expire after 15 minutes for security reasons. If the code expires, you will need to restart the process by requesting a new code.

If you can no longer access the email address associated with your account, follow these steps to avoid being locked out: Update the email if logged in: If you are still logged in, quickly update the email address before enabling two-factor authentication. This ensures that the verification code will be sent to a functional address. Contact technical support: If you permanently lose access to the email, contact the support team, which can help you regain access after verifying your identity. Recommendations for Optimal MFA Usage Keep your email secure: Make sure your email address is secure, with a strong password and 2FA enabled if possible. Your PRO GESTION SOFT account relies on the security of this email. Do not share your code: The verification code received via email is personal. Do not share it with anyone to ensure your account's confidentiality. Monitor suspicious logins: If you receive a verification code without attempting to log in, it may indicate an unauthorized access attempt. In this case, immediately change your password and contact support if necessary.
documents.s: What to do if you lose access to your email?

documents.t: If you wish to disable two-factor authentication via email, you can do so from the Security section of your Profile Space. Follow the same instructions as for ‘’Enabling Multi-Factor Authentication’’. The button will now be labeled "Disable." warning Note that disabling two-factor authentication will reduce the security level of your account. It is recommended to keep it active to protect your information.
Read this section faster with available resources.

warning This documentation is incomplete and does not yet explore each resource and endpoint in detail. We will gradually complete this section with: Accepted parameters. Possible responses with status codes (200 OK, 400 Bad Request, etc.). Examples of requests and responses. Whether you're building a custom solution or automating processes, our API provides a powerful and flexible interface to access data and integrate our features directly into your own applications. Here's what you can do: Task automation: Connect and automate your workflows by leveraging real-time management data. Custom integrations: Create solutions tailored to your business needs. Centralized access: Interact with various Pro Gestion Soft modules via a unified interface.

RESTful API: Follows REST standards, ensuring simple and efficient integration. Formats: All requests and responses are formatted in JSON for universal integration. Security: Each call is secured with authentication tokens based on the OAuth 2.0 protocol. Multi-module: Interaction with various modules such as user management, billing, or company documents. Versioning: Adopts a stable approach with clear API versions (v1, v2, etc.).

Log in to your Pro Gestion Soft account and go to the developer space to generate your API key. This key is unique and personal. The developer section is not fully available yet. We are still doing some security checks and will soon deploy it at a larger scale.

You can test your first request by running the following code to retrieve your profile information: curl -X GET "https://***.com/v1/{resource}" -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_AUTH_TOKEN" We will provide more details on this section soon.

Each request follows a standard structure: HTTP methods: Use GET, POST, PUT, or DELETE depending on the action. URL: Format your requests by following the structure https://***.com/v1/{resource}. Headers: Provide necessary information such as authentication and content type. Body: Add data in a structured JSON format for POST and PUT requests.
GET / Invoices curl -X GET "https://***.com/v1/invoices" -H "Authorization: Bearer VOTRE_JETON_D_AUTHENTIFICATION"

POST / Invoices curl -X POST "https://***.com/v1/invoices" -H "Authorization: Bearer VOTRE_JETON_D_AUTHENTIFICATION" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{ "client_id": "12345", "amount": 1000, "due_date": "2024-12-15" }'

DELETE / Users curl -X DELETE "https://***.com/v1/users/12345" -H "Authorization: Bearer VOTRE_JETON_D_AUTHENTIFICATION" Conditions and Limitations Rate limits: Each account has a monthly API call quota. Check your limits in the Developer section. Sensitive data: Handle confidential data with care and follow best security practices. Testing and validation: Use our playground to validate your integrations before deploying. Versioning: The API is versioned to ensure backward compatibility. Currently, it is at version /v1/.

Welcome to the Pro Gestion Soft developer space! This documentation has been specially designed to help you customize and integrate our tools into your professional projects. Whether you're an integrator, analyst, or solution creator, you will find the necessary resources here to fully leverage the potential of our platform. In this section, we will explore key features organized to meet the diverse needs of developers: Embedding iFrames Learn how to extract interactive and dynamic widgets from the PGS cloud library and easily integrate them into third-party websites. With these iFrames, you can enhance your user interfaces with ready-to-use features while centralizing your data. Creating Static Sites We will show you how to design and integrate static sites directly into the PGS platform. This section details the processes for creating dynamic data visualizations, essential for making strategic decisions based on customized indicators. API Reference Dive into our API documentation to understand how to interact with the different PGS modules (user management, billing, cloud library, etc.). You will learn how to make secure API calls, handle real-time data, and automate your workflows. Playground Take advantage of an interactive space dedicated to testing and experimenting in real-time. The playground allows you to manipulate code, explore practical examples, and validate your integrations before implementing them.

This environment has been designed to allow you to discover, test, and experiment with the features of our platform in a friendly and practical setting. Access the Playground and select a specific simulator from the module you wish to explore.

You have access to interactive tools to: Interactive editor: Write and modify code live. Results will be displayed in real-time, allowing you to test your ideas immediately. Preview only: If you prefer a lighter experience, you can simply view a preview of the features without diving into the code. Code only: View the source code of each simulator. This can be a starting point for you to quickly begin your projects. warning We apply advanced formatting to the "Preview" simulators by default. The interactive rendering simulator supports other formats. You will need to create and integrate your custom styles, depending on the experience you wish to create.

To ensure an optimal and secure experience, we ask you to follow these guidelines: Responsible use: The Playground is an educational environment. Avoid running malicious code or submitting sensitive data. Simulated data: All data used is fictitious. Do not attempt to test real or confidential information in this space. Code backup: Make sure to save your codes and configurations locally before leaving the Playground. Changes made here are not saved permanently. Browser compatibility: For a smooth experience, we recommend using a modern and up-to-date browser. By exploring this Playground, you will develop your skills, test your ideas, and contribute to enriching our community. Have fun and learn with peace of mind!
Welcome to the documentation for PRO GESTION SOFT (PGS), an integrated management platform specially designed to meet the needs of small and medium-sized businesses (SMBs) in Benin and Africa.

This documentation aims to guide you step by step in using and configuring the platform, while providing practical advice and solutions to common issues. This all-in-one tool, designed to simplify internal operations within companies, enables the centralization of key functions such as email management, human resources, documents, recruitment processes, as well as sales and purchases. Whether you are an administrator, employee, or HR manager, this documentation will provide you with all the information necessary to fully utilize the platform's features.
Throughout this documentation, you will encounter various technical and specific terms. This table presents some of them (non-exhaustive list) with explanations. Term Meaning
